'''鈭歵-ch-g''' ('''katachag''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:practicalise|practicalise]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-ch-g
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:practicalise|practicalise]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歵-ch-g
|-
! Lemma
| katachag
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thitachag|thitachag]] || [[word:jitachag|jitachag]] || [[word:shitachag|shitachag]] || [[word:kitachag|kitachag]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthutachag|thuthutachag]] || [[word:jujutachag|jujutachag]] || [[word:shushutachag|shushutachag]] || [[word:kukutachag|kukutachag]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thutachag|thutachag]] || [[word:jutachag|jutachag]] || [[word:shutachag|shutachag]] || [[word:kutachag|kutachag]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thutachag|thutachag]] || [[word:jutachag|jutachag]] || [[word:shutachag|shutachag]] || [[word:kutachag|kutachag]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thetachag|thetachag]] || [[word:jetachag|jetachag]] || [[word:shetachag|shetachag]] || [[word:ketachag|ketachag]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothotachag|thothotachag]] || [[word:jojotachag|jojotachag]] || [[word:shoshotachag|shoshotachag]] || [[word:kokotachag|kokotachag]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thotachag|thotachag]] || [[word:jotachag|jotachag]] || [[word:shotachag|shotachag]] || [[word:kotachag|kotachag]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thotachag|thotachag]] || [[word:jotachag|jotachag]] || [[word:shotachag|shotachag]] || [[word:kotachag|kotachag]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙tachag|th忙tachag]] || [[word:j忙tachag|j忙tachag]] || [[word:sh忙tachag|sh忙tachag]] || [[word:k忙tachag|k忙tachag]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathatachag|thathatachag]] || [[word:jajatachag|jajatachag]] || [[word:shashatachag|shashatachag]] || [[word:kakatachag|kakatachag]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thatachag|thatachag]] || [[word:jatachag|jatachag]] || [[word:shatachag|shatachag]] || [[word:katachag|katachag]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thatachag|thatachag]] || [[word:jatachag|jatachag]] || [[word:shatachag|shatachag]] || [[word:katachag|katachag]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shatachag|shatachag]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshatachag|goshatachag]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishatachag|gokishatachag]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shatachagn眉|shatachagn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshatachagnkn眉|goshatachagnkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishatachagn眉|gokishatachagn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shatachagsh毛|shatachagsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshatachagnksh毛|goshatachagnksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishatachagsh毛|gokishatachagsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shatachagro|shatachagro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshatachagnkro|goshatachagnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishatachagro|gokishatachagro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shatachagmu|shatachagmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshatachagnkmu|goshatachagnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishatachagmu|gokishatachagmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shatachagsher|shatachagsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshatachagnksher|goshatachagnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishatachagsher|gokishatachagsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shatachagng|shatachagng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshatachagnkng|goshatachagnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishatachagng|gokishatachagng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shatachagya|shatachagya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshatachagnkya|goshatachagnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishatachagya|gokishatachagya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shatachagyam|shatachagyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshatachagnkyam|goshatachagnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishatachagyam|gokishatachagyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shatachagn眉sh毛|shatachagn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshatachagnkn眉sh毛|goshatachagnkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishatachagn眉sh毛|gokishatachagn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shatachagn眉ro|shatachagn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshatachagnkn眉ro|goshatachagnkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishatachagn眉ro|gokishatachagn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shatachagn眉mu|shatachagn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshatachagnkn眉mu|goshatachagnkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishatachagn眉mu|gokishatachagn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shatachagsh毛n眉|shatachagsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshatachagnksh毛n眉|goshatachagnksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishatachagsh毛n眉|gokishatachagsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shatachagsh毛ro|shatachagsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshatachagnksh毛ro|goshatachagnksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishatachagsh毛ro|gokishatachagsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shatachagsh毛mu|shatachagsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshatachagnksh毛mu|goshatachagnksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishatachagsh毛mu|gokishatachagsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shatachagron眉|shatachagron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshatachagnkron眉|goshatachagnkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishatachagron眉|gokishatachagron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shatachagrosh毛|shatachagrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshatachagnkrosh毛|goshatachagnkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishatachagrosh毛|gokishatachagrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shatachagromu|shatachagromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshatachagnkromu|goshatachagnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishatachagromu|gokishatachagromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shatachagmun眉|shatachagmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshatachagnkmun眉|goshatachagnkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishatachagmun眉|gokishatachagmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shatachagmush毛|shatachagmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshatachagnkmush毛|goshatachagnkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishatachagmush毛|gokishatachagmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shatachagmuro|shatachagmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshatachagnkmuro|goshatachagnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishatachagmuro|gokishatachagmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|ed5025b}}
